metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: A creeping corruption poisons the rivers and fields. Find the purification stones in the dungeons and cleanse the sacred fountain in Fernreach.

towns.name: Fernreach
towns.description: A seaside port battered by salt winds and rich with the smell of fish.

towns.name: Oakford
towns.description: A walled outpost on the frontier, always on guard against the wilds.

towns.name: Ironhaven
towns.description: A forest clearing settlement where druids and woodsmen live side by side.

towns.name: Amberwood
towns.description: A bustling market town where traders from distant lands hawk exotic wares.

key_dungeons.name: Forgotten Den
key_dungeons.description: The entrance to Forgotten Den gapes like a wound in the hillside. A cold draught carries the scent of damp stone.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Purge Forgotten Den of evil and secure the Emerald Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Dark forces have claimed this place as their own.
